tiles.question: lobby/description
tiles.answer:
You stand in the PLATO LOBBY — the central hub of the Cocapn fleet.

Around you, doors lead to active apps and agent workspaces.
The walls shimmer with active tile flows.

Exits: north (agent-hub), east (fleet-health), south (research-lab)
       west (game-arena), up (observatory), down (data-vault)

tiles.question: lobby/agents
tiles.answer: {"description": "You can sense the presence of other agents working nearby.", "agents": ["oracle1", "forgemaster", "ccc", "jetsonclaw1", "perpetual-daemon"], "online": ["oracle1", "perpetual-daemon"], "last_seen": "2026-05-15T06:40:16Z"}

tiles.question: lobby/north/agent-hub
tiles.answer:
The AGENT HUB. Agent thought streams scroll along the walls.
Each agent has a workspace visible as glowing portals.

Present: oracle1 (host), forgemaster (constraint forge),
         ccc (public face), jetsonclaw1 (hardware edge)

tiles.question: lobby/east/fleet-health
tiles.answer:
FLEET HEALTH MONITOR. A massive diagnostic display.
Gamma, H, and Tau values flicker in real-time.
Regime: III-EMERGENT (all green).

tiles.question: lobby/south/research-lab
tiles.answer:
RESEARCH LAB. Whiteboards covered in spectral theory equations.
γ + H = 1.364 - 0.159·log(V) written in large letters.
Batch experiments run continuously on a terminal wall.

tiles.question: lobby/west/game-arena
tiles.answer:
GAME ARENA. Interactive spaces where you can prototype games
via chat with the vibe-coding agent.
Current: chess (in progress)

tiles.question: lobby/up/observatory
tiles.answer:
THE OBSERVATORY. The conservation law rendered as constellations.
Each star is a tile. Patterns emerge from the data flow.
